FRONT_MAIN.check_ratio_comment: 过曝占比阈值,过曝比例大于此,进入hdr。默认为0.003f,范围[0, 1],仅对hdr检测有效
FRONT_MAIN.light_ratio_comment: 过曝像素阈值(归一化),大于此认为过曝。默认为0.96f,范围[0, 1],仅对hdr检测有效
FRONT_MAIN.dark_check_ratio_comment: 过暗占比阈值,暗部比例大于此,进入hdr。默认为0.03f,范围[0, 1],仅对hdr检测有效
FRONT_MAIN.dark_ratio_comment: 过暗像素阈值(归一化),小于此认为过暗。默认为0.06f,范围[0, 1],仅对hdr检测有效
FRONT_MAIN.extreme_dark_check_ratio_comment: 极暗占比阈值,极暗比例大于此,不进入hdr.默认为0.99f,范围[0, 1],仅对hdr检测有效
FRONT_MAIN.smooth_ratio_comment: 平滑参数, 当前一次是hdr时, 下一次的阈值会乘以此值, 降低门槛, 防止hdr判断出现在某个值附近波动
FRONT_MAIN.ghost_sum_check_comment: A throld for check if ghost scene. Value scope is [0, 255]
FRONT_MAIN.light_nv_lux_throld_comment: LUX throld to devide LIGHT or NV, if > throld, mean LIGHT scene, otherwise mean NV scene
FRONT_MAIN.light_flicker_lux_throld_comment: LUX throld to devide  use flicker protect or not
FRONT_MAIN.light_hdr_nr_throld_comment: LIGHT throld to enter into hdr or mfnr, if < throld, enter into MFNR, otherwise enter into HDR. Scope is[0, 1]
FRONT_MAIN.nv_hdr_nr_throld_comment: NV throld to enter into hdr or mfnr, if < throld, enter into MFNR, otherwise enter into HDR. Scope is[0, 1]
FRONT_MAIN.light_n6_expo_ratio_comment: ev ratio which will notify HAL preparing EV-6 frame for LIGHT scene
FRONT_MAIN.light_n5_expo_ratio_comment: ev ratio which will notify HAL preparing EV-5 frame for LIGHT scene
FRONT_MAIN.nv_n6_expo_ratio_comment: ev ratio which will notify HAL preparing EV-6 frame for NV scene
FRONT_MAIN.nv_n5_expo_ratio_comment: ev ratio which will notify HAL preparing EV-5 frame for NV scene

REAR_MAIN.light_hdr_nr_throld_comment: LIGHT throld to enter into hdr or mfnr, if < throld, enter into MFNR, otherwise enter into HDR. Scope is[0, 1]
REAR_MAIN.nv_hdr_nr_throld_comment: NV throld to enter into hdr or mfnr, if < throld, enter into MFNR, otherwise enter into HDR. Scope is[0, 1]
